{ "name": "shalvah/clara", "description": "🔊 Simple, pretty, testable console output for CLI apps.", "keywords": [ "log", "logging", "cli" ], "license": "MIT", "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Shalvah\\Clara\\": "src/" }, "files": [ "helpers.php" ] }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Shalvah\\Clara\\Tests\\": "tests/" } }, "require": { "php": ">=7.4", "symfony/console": "^4.0|^5.0|^6.0|^7.0" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.1", "eloquent/phony-phpunit": "^7.0" }, "scripts": { "test": "phpunit tests --stop-on-failure", "test-ci": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests" } }
